name: nephthys
description: Convenience npm scripts for running Nephthys (Python) in dev and deploy modes

scripts.deploy: bash -c "pkill -f 'uv run nephthys' || true; pkill -f uvicorn || true; docker rm -f hh-postgres hh-postgres-5433 || true; bash scripts/ensure-db.sh; ENVIRONMENT=production uv run nephthys"
